\section{Equations}

The famous equation $E = mc^2$ is well known.

A display equation:

\begin{equation}
\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
\end{equation}

Another inline formula: \(a^2 + b^2 = c^2\).
